DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE CORPORATION'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE,
DEFENDANT KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC.'S JOINDER IN DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE'S MOTION

The Court clarified its tentative ruling on the record. Tentative ruling was adopted as revised: Defendant Union Carbide Corporation's motion to continue the trial date is granted. The September 14, 2015 trial date is continued to January 19, 2016 at 11:15a.m. in Department 503. Expert discovery and fact discovery are re-opened on the limited issue of decedent's lung cancer and this limited discovery closes on January 15, 2016. All other fact discovery and all other expert discovery remains dictated by the September 14, 2015 trial date. Defendant demonstrated good cause to continue the trial date, as required by CRC 3.1332, and no party opposes defendant's request. Order signed in open court.
No objection to the tentative ruling on Defendant Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc.'s joinder. The Court adopted its tentative ruling: Joinder is denied as moot given the ruling on the underlying motion.
